title: CNBC quintic nonexistence family campaign
family_name: Closed-neighborhood balanced colorings of quintic circulants
strongest_honest_claim: The repo already supports a theorem-slice campaign based on Fourier and periodicity obstructions to CNBC colorings in selected quintic circulants.
paper_title_hint: Fourier and periodicity obstructions to closed-neighborhood balanced colorings in quintic circulants
theorem_slice_target: A two-route Fourier/periodicity nonexistence theorem for selected quintic circulants.
fallback_target: A structural obstruction package with exact frontier applications C16, C20, and C24 if the unified criterion theorem is not yet clean.
next_blocker: Package the exact C16, C20, and C24 proofs as one clean criterion theorem, especially the opposite-pair reduction in the C20 line.
